faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Millburn, NJ?
faqs.answer: Millburn properties most frequently encounter German cockroaches, American cockroaches, and Oriental cockroaches. German roaches are common in kitchens and bathrooms, while American and Oriental species often enter through basements and crawl spaces, especially in older homes near wooded areas.
